name: YUM BRANDS INC
summary: Yum! Brands, Inc. is a global quick-service restaurant company operating three major franchise brands: KFC, Pizza Hut, and Taco Bell. The company franchises and operates restaurants worldwide across numerous countries, offering fried chicken, pizza, and Mexican-inspired food products. It also operates The Habit Restaurants and Saucy Restaurants concepts, with subsidiaries spanning technology, advertising, franchising, real estate, and international holdings across more than 20 countries.

products.name: KFC
products.description: Quick-service fried chicken restaurant brand with global franchise operations.

products.name: Pizza Hut
products.description: Quick-service pizza restaurant brand with global franchise and delivery operations.

products.name: Taco Bell
products.description: Quick-service Mexican-inspired food restaurant brand with global franchise operations.

products.name: The Habit Restaurants
products.description: Fast-casual restaurant concept operated as a subsidiary of Yum! Brands.

products.name: Saucy Restaurants
products.description: Restaurant concept operated under Yum! Brands umbrella.

products.name: Dragontail Systems
products.description: Technology platform for restaurant order management and delivery optimization.

products.name: QuikOrder
products.description: Digital ordering platform subsidiary supporting restaurant online ordering.

products.name: Yum Connect
products.description: Technology connectivity platform supporting Yum! Brands restaurant operations.
